terrain.description: Terrain must read as continuous outdoor ground material with no border, no center object, and no scene illustration.

resource_node.description: Resource nodes must present one clear resource subject on transparent background with strong small-size readability.

building_map.description: Buildings must keep a consistent map-view angle, strong outline, and readable mass at 32px.

ui_icon_fallback.description: UI icons must communicate one idea with minimal clutter and clean transparency.

character_portrait.description: Character portraits must have obvious profession identity and a stable UI-friendly face crop.

boss_portrait.description: Boss portraits must look threatening, distinct, and readable as boss-grade characters.
